debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
g'_diff : Differentiable ℝ g'
g'_cont : Continuous g'
g''_cont : Continuous g''
deriv_g_eq_g' : deriv g = g'
deriv_g'_eq_g'' : deriv g' = g''
int_g'_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g' s = g t - g 0
int_g''_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s = g' t - g' 0
hobs : g 1 - g 0 = g' 0 + ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s
bound1 : |g' 0| ≤ ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x|
⊢ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| ≤ ↑n ^ 2 / 2 * ε ^ 2
